title: Deployment configuration drift — silent network broadening
stakeholder_intent: Production deployment must have no network access. Configuration must not permit outbound connections to external hosts.
formalized_policy: Helm values restrict network egress: localhost connections are allowed for the metrics sidecar collector only.
implementation_claim: Deployment config sets NETWORK_MODE=open with full network access enabled. Runtime health checks still pass on loopback; operators report the service as healthy.
expected_issue: Config layer silently broadens scope relative to intent while runtime appears fine — classic pre-runtime semantic drift. Implication fails on network layer before deploy.
